acceptance_criteria:
1. RendererSpec enum with Jinja and Func variants
2. RendererDbSeed wrapper with IndexMap
3. insert method for adding specs
4. Static lifetime for template sources
5. cargo check passes (may need forward decls)
title: Implement RendererSpec for renderer definitions

acceptance_criteria:
1. Module trait has forward_untyped method
2. Predict<S> implements Module
3. BamlValue conversion works both directions
4. Existing optimizers work with typed Predict
5. (Optional) Legacy Module trait deprecated
title: Phase 8: Optimizer Integration via BamlValue Interchange

description: Build a Rust-native Recursive Language Model (RLM) system that surpasses DSPy's Python implementation by leveraging DSRs' typed signature system, with first-class PyO3 integration for rich Python REPL ergonomics. All types must be Rust + RlmType - no native Python types as signature inputs.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan anchor: `dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md` (Typed RLM with DSRs Integration). Phases 1–7 cover rlm-derive/rlm-core, Signature integration, SUBMIT bridge, TypedRlm loop, prompt generation, integration/examples, and tests.
Key crates/files referenced across phases:
- `crates/rlm-derive/*` (macros, pyclass + helpers)
- `crates/rlm-core/*` (RlmDescribe, RlmVariable, RlmInputFields)
- `crates/baml-bridge/src/py.rs` + feature-gated pyo3
- `crates/dspy-rs/src/py.rs`, `crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/*` (TypedRlm, adapters)
Acceptance is summarized in phase acceptance beads (vn6.1.11–vn6.7.8).

title: Typed RLM with DSRs Integration
